articles.title: Spotify's mobile app may soon get a feature fans have wanted for 15 years - Android Authority
articles.description: Spotify is working towards finally bringing the 'Playlist folders' feature to its mobile app after it first launched back in 2010!

articles.title: Breaking: First One UI 9 build appears for the Galaxy S26 Ultra - SamMobile
articles.description: Samsung recently launched the Galaxy S26 series with One UI 8.5 onboard. The phones in the lineup were the first Galaxy devices to run the stable version of the new software. Now, the first One UI 9 build has appeared for the Galaxy S26 Ultra, marking an impo…

articles.title: Despite record Galaxy S26 pre-orders, Samsung's mobile unit is literally in emergency mode - Android Authority
articles.description: Samsung is seeing record Galaxy S26 series pre-orders, but the mobile unit is entering 'emergency management' due to financial concerns.

articles.title: OnePlus' US Community has turned into a 'ghost town,' users say - Android Authority
articles.description: OnePlus users in the United States are reporting that the company's Community app has been broken for days and lacks regular updates.
